markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review recent content performance and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Traffic Spiked:** Organic traffic from Google and Bing grew significantly last week, driven by a rewritten article ("Orange Line") ranking for "AI coding tools."](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Newsletter Paused:** The newsletter is on hold pending a one-pager from GrowthX detailing the acquisition model (e.g., CTA conversion rates) for non-user signups.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**Reporting Evolving:** Weekly reports will now include a narrative analysis of performance changes to explain the "why" behind the data, enabling actionable learning.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Refined:** The team is prioritizing high-ROI refreshes and new comparison/alternative articles, while pausing low-priority Reddit and "Augie" work.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Spike

  - [**Observation:** Organic traffic from Google and Bing spiked significantly last week.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Attribution:** The spike is primarily driven by a rewritten article ("Orange Line") ranking for "AI coding tools."](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The success of this article, which received extensive backlinking, suggests a high-ROI model for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Action:** The team will analyze this model to inform future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### Newsletter Strategy

  - [**Proposal:** Relaunch the newsletter as a bi-weekly, brand/product-focused update, requiring collaboration with the Augment Code product team.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**Goal:** Acquire 4k–6k signups in the first 6 months post-December launch.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Acquisition Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
      - [**Organic:** CTAs on the main site and alternating on content articles.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Event Lists:** Add contacts from events (e.g., Kubecon) to the list.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Trial Users:** Potentially add non-converting trial users to the list.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Decision:** Paused pending a one-pager from GrowthX detailing the acquisition model's mechanics and assumptions (e.g., traffic, CTA conversion rates).](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Reporting & OKRs

  - [**Requirement:** A single source of truth for tracking OKR metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**New Format:** Weekly reports will evolve from raw data to a narrative analysis explaining performance changes.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Example:** "Traffic spiked because the 'Orange Line' article ranked higher for 'AI coding tools'."](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To enable actionable learning from performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

### Content Strategy & Roadmap

  - [**Focus:** High-ROI activities, including:](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** Updating well-performing articles to further improve rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**New Content:** Creating more product alternative and comparison articles, which have proven to be high-traffic drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [**Rationale for Broad Coverage:**](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**SEO Signal:** Signals to Google that Augment Code is a comprehensive authority.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Low Cost:** The cost of writing additional listicles is low.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
      - [**Potential Discovery:** Some niche topics may surprise with unexpected traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [**New Persona:** Expanding the roadmap to include less technical content for an enterprise persona.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

### Paused Initiatives

  - [**Reddit:** Paused due to low priority and lack of clear ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [**"Augie" Content:** Blocked pending review by AJ, who is currently focused on event work.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [Create a one-pager on the proposed newsletter acquisition model.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [Implement the new narrative-based weekly reporting format.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**Augment Code:**](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [Provide the "Augie" content review to unblock the team.](https://fathom.video/share/azzg8u1ho7Ub68_vXFanpdve2sTzZsjf?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
